title: Coniugare agrotecniche sostenibili e fertilizzanti rinnovabili, il GOI SOS_AQUAE
subtitle: CONVEGNO FINALE
description: A final conference presentation of the SOS_AQUAE project showcasing sustainable conservation agriculture practices combined with renewable fertilizers to balance productivity, water use, and environmental impact. It summarizes field trials in Piacenza comparing subsurface drip irrigation and sprinkler systems on maize and soybean for improved nitrogen use efficiency and reduced N₂O emissions.
